name: Mock
strengthDescription: Simulated provider for testing and development. Supports all capabilities with mock responses.

name: ClaudeCli
strengthDescription: Best for reasoning, architecture analysis, code review, and complex implementation tasks. Strong at following structured output formats.

name: CodexCli

name: CopilotCli
